series_metadata.series_description: Dismissed Action: ethics grievance not certified to a formal action; Grievance received; conditionally dismissed and not reopened.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: - conditional dismissals, electronic medium a period of from date of dismissal; , delete electronic medium. (This does not apply a conditional dismissal that is reopened.) ; Paper: - conditional dismissals, physical file, if it was not scanned, a period of from date of dismissal; , shred physical file. (This does not apply a conditional dismissal that is reopened.)
